name: Can I actually get Siri to mention my site or brand more often?
description: Yes, but only by making your content clearer and more authoritative than competing sources.

mainEntity.name: Can I actually get Siri to mention my site or brand more often?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, but only if your source is easier for Siri to understand than competing sources. That means concise answers, strong page titles, schema markup where appropriate, and consistent brand/entity data across your site and profiles. If Siri is repeatedly missing you, the issue is usually clarity or inconsistency rather than a single missing trick.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, but only by making your content clearer and more authoritative than competing sources.
